item.action: Classify Web Audio render-capacity telemetry without treating unsupported or absent telemetry as healthy playback.

progress.finding: AudioRenderCapacity is useful pressure evidence only when supported and sampled; capability absence remains unresolved.
progress.verification: 6 deterministic assertions passed in an isolated Node runtime using byte-identical committed content

item.handoff: Vercel Studio may record render-capacity samples when the API exists, but must retain the existing direct gesture, render-position, and audible/device evidence paths because capacity telemetry does not prove physical sound output.
